MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Grinsell Lake LLC is present. Represented by Tom Carpio.
Attorney Brenda C. Keith appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Eva A Ropp and Oscar Aceves are present.
Attorney Jenifer DeMarco representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem James Watson , litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A , for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of June - 25 -2012 remains on calendar.(501/JPT)
